title: pyrostria subevenia
intro: Pyrostria subevenia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "African Wild Jasmine" due to its fragrant flowers. Traditionally, Pyrostria subevenia has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from pain and inflammation, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pyrostria subevenia is often combined with other plants to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
